title: Krakatit
writer: Karel Capek, Otakar Vávra, Jaroslav Vávra
actors: Karel Höger, Florence Marly, Eduard Linkers
plot: After an accidental explosion in the lab, its inventor slips in and out of dream-like hallucinations, realizing that he had given the formula to one of his colleagues, who he tries to stop before it is too late.
